channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Crude oil rockets past $100 as markets lose hope for a quick resolution in Iran
item.description: Brent crude reached its highest price since Russia invaded Ukraine in 2022. Gasoline prices in the U.S. are expected to continue to rise.
item.content:encoded:
Brent crude reached its highest price since Russia invaded Ukraine in 2022. Gasoline prices in the U.S. are expected to continue to rise.

(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Country Joe McDonald, anti-war singer who electrified Woodstock, dies at 84
item.description: Country Joe and the Fish's best-known song, "I-Feel-Like-I'm-Fixin'-to-Die Rag," captured the growing anti-war sentiment of the Vietnam era.
item.content:encoded:
Country Joe and the Fish's best-known song, "I-Feel-Like-I'm-Fixin'-to-Die Rag," captured the growing anti-war sentiment of the Vietnam era.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Georgia's special election to fill vacated House seat
item.description: Voters in Northwest Georgia are choosing who should replace former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene as voting closes in a special election Tuesday. In a crowded race, the weight of Trump's endorsement will be tested.
item.content:encoded: Voters in Northwest Georgia are choosing who should replace former Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene as voting closes in a special election Tuesday. In a crowded race, the weight of Trump's endorsement will be tested.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Kallis

item.title: OpenAI robotics leader resigns over concerns about Pentagon AI deal
item.description: A senior member of OpenAI's robotics team said guardrails around certain AI uses were not sufficiently defined before OpenAI announced an agreement with the Pentagon.
item.content:encoded:
A senior member of OpenAI's robotics team said guardrails around certain AI uses were not sufficiently defined before OpenAI announced an agreement with the Pentagon.

(Image credit: Mandel Ngan)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Trump says he won't sign bills until Congress overhauls voting
item.description: President Trump is pushing the Senate to abandon the filibuster and pass SAVE American Act, a bill top Democrat calls 'Jim Crow 2.0'
item.content:encoded:
President Trump is pushing the Senate to abandon the filibuster and pass SAVE American Act, a bill top Democrat calls 'Jim Crow 2.0'

(Image credit: Mark Schiefelbein/AP)
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Photos: Scenes from Jesse Jackson's homegoing services
item.description: Thousands showed up in Chicago over the weekend to pay respects to the civil rights leader, who died last month at the age of 84.
item.content:encoded:
Thousands showed up in Chicago over the weekend to pay respects to the civil rights leader, who died last month at the age of 84.

(Image credit: Kenn Cook Jr. for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Danielle A. Scruggs

item.title: Five key takeaways from an annual briefing by China's foreign minister
item.description: Speaking at a political gathering in Beijing, China's foreign minister Wang Yi outlined his country's positions on the war in Iran and general relations with America.
item.content:encoded:
Speaking at a political gathering in Beijing, China's foreign minister Wang Yi outlined his country's positions on the war in Iran and general relations with America.

(Image credit: Andy Wong)
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Pak

item.title: Police investigate an explosion outside the U.S. Embassy in Oslo
item.description: Norwegian police are investigating an explosion outside the U.S. Embassy in Oslo early Sunday, officials said.
item.content:encoded:
Norwegian police are investigating an explosion outside the U.S. Embassy in Oslo early Sunday, officials said.

(Image credit: Hans O. Torgersen/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Photos: These bold women stand up for justice, rights ... and freedom
item.description: To mark International Women's Day, we feature portraits and profiles of determined women around the world.
item.content:encoded:
To mark International Women's Day, we feature portraits and profiles of determined women around the world.

(Image credit: Annice Lyn)
item.dc:creator: Kamala Thiagarajan

item.title: Iran names Mojtaba Khamenei as its new supreme leader
item.description: Iran selected Mojtaba Khamenei as the new supreme leader. He is the son of the previous supreme leader. Also on Sunday, the U.S. announced the death of a seventh service member in the war.
item.content:encoded:
Iran selected Mojtaba Khamenei as the new supreme leader. He is the son of the previous supreme leader. Also on Sunday, the U.S. announced the death of a seventh service member in the war.

(Image credit: Rouzbeh Fouladi)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff
